| Method | Path | Operation ID | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `GET` | `/readyz` | `getReadiness` | Check whether the API process can serve traffic |

| Method | Path | Operation ID | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/jobs` | `listAdminJobs` | List durable workspace jobs |

| `PATCH` | `/api/v1/admin/workspace` | `updateAdminWorkspace` | Rename the authenticated workspace |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/members` | `listAdminMembers` | List workspace members |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/members` | `createAdminMember` | Create a workspace member |

## Authentication

| Method | Path | Operation ID | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/sessions` | `createWebSession` | Create a local web session |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/auth/session` | `getWebSession` | Get the current web session |
| `DELETE` | `/api/v1/auth/session` | `deleteWebSession` | Revoke the current web session |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/session/refresh` | `refreshWebSession` | Rotate the current web-session credentials |
| `PATCH` | `/api/v1/auth/password` | `changeAccountPassword` | Change the current user's local password |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/auth/device-sessions` | `listDeviceSessions` | List the current user's active device sessions |
| `DELETE` | `/api/v1/auth/device-sessions/{device_session_id}` | `revokeDeviceSession` | Revoke one of the current user's device sessions |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/pairing-sessions` | `createPairingSession` | Create a one-time device-pairing payload |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/pairing-sessions/{pairing_session_id}/claim` | `claimPairingSession` | Exchange a one-time pairing capability for a device session |

## Assets

| Method | Path | Operation ID | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/assets` | `listAssets` | List or search voice assets |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/assets` | `createAsset` | Create a draft voice asset |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/assets/{asset_id}` | `getAsset` | Get a voice asset |
| `DELETE` | `/api/v1/assets/{asset_id}` | `trashAsset` | Move a voice asset to trash |
| `PUT` | `/api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/metadata` | `updateAssetMetadata` | Replace mutable asset metadata |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/restore` | `restoreAsset` | Restore a voice asset from trash |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/assets/{asset_id}/purge` | `purgeAsset` | Permanently delete a trashed voice asset |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/asset-purge-jobs/{purge_job_id}` | `getAssetPurgeJob` | Get a permanent-deletion job |
